what:
Read masked data from a JSON file.
If the JSON file has a 'dataset' field,
then each member of this field is assumed
to refer to a CSV file to read a masked
data sample from. — md_read_json

what:
Write masked data data frame (tibble) object to a CSV (comma separated file),
optionally writing associated meta-data to a JSON file. In particular, meta-data
in this case is defined as the attributes of the data frame object. — md_write_csv
title:
Write masked data data frame (tibble) object to a CSV (comma separated file),
optionally writing associated meta-data to a JSON file. In particular, meta-data
in this case is defined as the attributes of the data frame object. — md_write_csv
text: Write masked data data frame (tibble) object CSV (comma separated file), optionally writing associated meta-data JSON file. particular, meta-data case defined attributes data frame object.
